// src/components/pleadings/CaseTypeGuidelines.jsx import React from 'react'; import { ArrowLeft, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const CaseTypeGuidelines = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (

Case Type Guidelines

Important Notes

  • Withholding only cases: No NTA or pleadings required
  • Removal cases: NTA present, pleadings may be required
  • San Francisco cases: No coversheets needed

Extra Declarations Required For:

  • Concord
  • Houston
  • IJ Haer of Atlanta – Peachtree
  • San Francisco
); }; export default CaseTypeGuidelines;
